role: A read-only inspector region that renders the newest-first version history of a selected node's output address as a styled list of CAS/timestamp/preview rows.
capabilities: Display version history for the currently selected versioned address
Show current vs prior version rows with kind badges
Render abbreviated CAS hash, relative timestamp, and content preview per version
Present an honest empty state when the address has no versions
Indicate loading state via the section header badge
Reuse shared design-system event-row and history layout tokens
substance_why: It fully implements a scoped, styled version-history viewer with address header, count badge, newest-first rows, current/prior classification, empty state, and loading indicator.
interactions_missing: No click/select action on a version row
No restore/revert to a prior version
No diff or compare between versions
No pagination, virtualization, or filtering for long histories
No keyboard navigation or focus management
No copy-to-clipboard for the CAS hash
No expanded preview or download of version bytes
No error/empty-due-to-failure state beyond the loading badge
performance_risks: Renders the entire versions array without virtualization or windowing
No memoization of row rendering or class-name computation
Preview text is placed in DOM and title attribute without length guarding
Fallback key uses array index when CAS is missing, risking reconciliation issues
reuse_why: The shared .ev/.hist design vocabulary and layout are coherent with sibling regions and should be preserved, but row rendering and interaction wiring need extraction and enhancement.
decomposition_hints: Extract a VersionRow component from the inline map body
Split the SectionHead/header concern from the list body
Move empty-state and loading-state rendering into small sub-components
Isolate version data normalization/formatting (cas abbreviation, relTime) into helpers or hooks
Keep the design-token class vocabulary in a shared style contract rather than inline strings
